# Hero Video

Place your intro video at `public/videos/avatar-intro.mp4`.

Requirements:
- Format: MP4 (H.264)
- Resolution: 1080p or higher recommended
- Duration: 10-30 seconds, loops seamlessly
- The avatar/subject should be visible in the upper/center portion

The hero section references `/videos/avatar-intro.mp4`. Until you add the file,
a Pexels poster image is shown as a fallback so the hero still looks polished.
